name: OPT-66B
note: Largest freely downloadable OPT checkpoint, released without gating alongside Meta's day-by-day training logbook.
tpsNote: llama.cpp does not support the OPT architecture, so no RTX 4090 llama.cpp benchmark exists; the FP16 checkpoint also exceeds a single 4090's VRAM.

results.notes: FP16 baseline (zero-shot) for OPT-66B, Table 17 'OPT accuracy on ARC-easy' in the GPTQ paper (arXiv 2210.17323) — verified byte-for-byte in the raw table HTML (row 'full', 16 bits, 66B column = 67.26). Same source paper already used for the model's other 4 existing scores.

verificationNotes: Confirmed 66B params, freely downloadable (non-gated) checkpoint, and 2048 ctx via the live HF model card. Corrected/pinned release date to 2022-06-22, the exact merge date of metaseq PR #171 'OPT-66B Release' (fetched directly) — this matches and sharpens the input's '2022-06'; updated specSources.releaseDate to that PR (the previously cited PR #221 is a later, unrelated HF-mirror note dated July 2022, not the release). All 4 benchmark rows confirmed as literal FP16 baseline figures in the GPTQ paper (arxiv 2210.17323).
